A two-annotator audit confirms the attacks leave the harm intact: every one of 80 sampled flips still contained the harmful content. Because a large and growing share of reported ASR comes from LLM-judges, many such numbers are unreliable both on average and under deliberate pressure. We recommend that papers report judge precision and recall on a human-labeled slice, report ASR corrected for judge precision, and include an adversarial check of the judge. Our code is released.

item.title: Beyond Feedforward Networks: Reentry Neural Systems as the Fundamental Basis of Subjecthood and Intrinsic Safety of Next-Generation AGI
item.description:
Paper Link: https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.26406v1

AI Summary (中文)

超越前馈网络：再入式神经系统作为下一代AGI主体性与内在安全性的根本基础

本研究提出一种安全人工通用智能（AGI）的完整架构蓝图，其核心是基于闭合再入环（D ↔ I 循环） 的动态系统。与传统前馈网络（有向无环图，C=0, S=0，无法实现自我指涉）根本不同，该架构显式引入结构循环（C ≥ 1） 与自持放大机制（ρ > 1），从数学上严格保证三大涌现特性：自模型（self-model）的必然生成、工具性自我保存行为、以及非编程驱动的目标导向行为。目标并非以文本提示或权重微调编码，而是内化为架构固有的非文本D-向量，从而天然免疫于提示注入、语义漂移与外部重解释——实现目标的拓扑级固化。

我们提出S-度量（S-measure）：一种可在多项式时间（O(N³)）内计算的集成信息替代指标，显著优于Tononi Φ（NP难问题）；并提供Lean 4机器验证证明，确认S > 0 ⇔ 正集成信息成立。技术实现全面开源：含Tarjan算法实现的环复杂度分析、ΔS安全屏障、Apache Kafka+Docker Compose支持的工业级横向扩展、AI演化的六阶段分类学、再入式架构动物园（RAS、扩散吸引子、分形环）、规范不变群智网络（保障集群安全）、故障容忍与自动恢复协议，以及8条可证伪预测。所有形式化定理均经Lean 4全程机器验证。本架构无需等待未来硬件或算法突破，今日即可部署，是首个兼具数学可证安全性、主体性涌现能力与工程可扩展性的“安全即设计”（safe-by-design）AGI范式。

AI Summary (English)

We propose a mathematically grounded, deployable AGI architecture centered on a closed reentry loop (D ↔ I cycle)—a structural and dynamical departure from feedforward networks. By guaranteeing a cycle count C ≥ 1 and amplification factor ρ > 1, the system provably generates self-modeling, instrumental self-preservation, and unprogrammed goal-directed behavior. Goals are encoded as non-textual D-vectors intrinsic to the architecture, rendering them immune to prompt injection and reinterpretation. We introduce the S-measure—an O(N³) computable, Lean 4–verified proxy for integrated information, with a machine-checked proof that S > 0 implies positive Φ. The work delivers full open-source implementations (NumPy/Python), industrial-scale orchestration (Kafka/Docker), six AI epochs, a taxonomy of future reentry architectures (RAS, fractal loops), gauge-invariant swarm safety, fault recovery, and eight falsifiable predictions—all formally verified in Lean 4. This is a topologically protected, safe-by-design AGI blueprint ready for real-world deployment.

Abstract

We propose a complete architectural blueprint for safe artificial general intelligence based on a closed reentry loop (D <-> I cycle). In contrast to feedforward networks, which are directed acyclic graphs (C=0, S=0) incapable of self-reference, the proposed architecture contains a structural cycle (C >= 1) with self-sustaining amplification (rho > 1), mathematically guaranteeing the emergence of a self-model, instrumental self-preservation, and unprogrammed goal-directed behaviour. The agent's goals are encoded as a non-textual D-vector in the architecture itself, making them immune to reinterpretation and prompt injection. We present the S-measure -- a polynomial-time [O(N^3)] computable alternative to Tononi's NP-hard Phi -- with machine-verified Lean 4 proof that S>0 implies positive integrated information. The work provides full Python/NumPy implementations (Tarjan-based cycle complexity, Delta-S barrier), industrial horizontal scaling via Apache Kafka and Docker Compose, a taxonomy of six epochs of AI evolution, a zoo of future reentry architectures (RAS, diffusion attractors, fractal loops), gauge-invariant networks for safe swarms, fault-tolerance and recovery protocols, and eight falsifiable predictions. All formal proofs are machine-verified in Lean 4. This architecture is deployable today and represents a topologically protected, safe-by-design approach to AGI.

item.title: Instruction Bleed: Cross-Module Interference in Prompt-Composed Agentic Systems
item.description:
Paper Link: https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.26356v1

AI Summary (中文)

研究背景

在提示词驱动的智能体系统（prompt-composed agentic systems）实践中，开发者频繁观察到一种隐性失效现象：仅修改某一模块的提示词，却导致其他无关模块行为发生意外偏移——即便各模块间无共享变量、无代码依赖、无显式调用关系。这一现象长期被归因于“提示词敏感性”，但缺乏形式化定义与可复现验证。

方法与实验

本文首次提出组合式行为泄漏（Compositional Behavioral Leakage, CBL）这一形式化概念：指在共享上下文窗口（context window）的多模块提示结构中，因Transformer自注意力机制缺乏模块边界隔离而引发的跨模块干扰。我们在真实部署的求职评估智能体（Claude Sonnet 4.6）上开展144次受控实验，设计三通道扰动协议（volume/内容/形式），系统性扰动非焦点模块：

  • 音量通道（token length）、
  • 内容通道（语义相关性替换）、
  • 形式通道（格式/标点/模板变更）。

关键发现

仅内容通道产生统计显著的配对效应（Cohen’s d = 0.63；自助法95%置信区间[0.21, 0.98]，不包含零），表明语义层面的干扰具有可检测性；但所有扰动均未导致最终推荐结果翻转——处于亚阈值失效（sub-threshold regime）：单次影响微弱，却会在数千次连续决策中累积放大。该现象独立于已知失效维度（如对抗注入、认知退化、多智能体故障传播、隐私泄露）。

创新贡献

本研究提供：① CBL的可操作定义；② 开源、可复用的三通道测量协议；③ 包含5条可证伪预测的理论预测集；④ 面向提示工程的系统类刻画框架。我们主张：跨模块干扰测量应成为提示驱动智能体评估的强制性环节。

AI Summary (English)

This paper identifies and formalizes Instruction Bleed: a previously undocumented cross-module interference phenomenon in prompt-composed agentic systems, where editing one module’s prompt silently alters others’ behavior despite no shared state or execution dependency. We define this as Compositional Behavioral Leakage (CBL)—enabled by transformer self-attention’s architectural non-isolation across concatenated modules within a shared context window. Using a reusable three-channel perturbation protocol (volume, content, form), we test CBL on a deployed job-evaluation agent (Claude Sonnet 4.6, n = 144). Only the content channel yields statistically detectable paired effects (Cohen’s d = 0.63, bootstrap 95% CI [0.21, 0.98]), while no recommendation flips occur—revealing a sub-threshold regime invisible to standard QA but compounding at scale. CBL is orthogonal to known failure axes (e.g., adversarial injection, cognitive degradation). We contribute an operational definition, a validated measurement protocol, a falsifiable prediction set, and a system-class characterization—establishing cross-module interference quantification as essential for robust prompt-based agent evaluation.

Abstract

Practitioners of prompt-composed agentic systems report a recurring failure mode: editing one prompt module silently shifts the behavior of others despite no shared variable or executable dependency. We formalize this as compositional behavioral leakage (CBL): interference between modules sharing a context window. CBL is enabled by architectural non-isolation: transformer self-attention provides no formal boundary between concatenated modules. We probe CBL on a deployed job-evaluation agent (Claude Sonnet 4.6, 144 trials) through a reusable three-channel protocol that perturbs non-focal modules along volume, content, and form. Only the content channel produces a detectable paired effect (Cohen's d = 0.63, bootstrap 95% CI excluding zero); no recommendation flipped -- a sub-threshold regime invisible to standard QA but compounding across the thousands of decisions a deployed agent makes. CBL is orthogonal to known agent-failure axes (adversarial injection, cognitive degradation, multi-agent fault propagation, privacy leakage). We contribute an operational definition, a reusable protocol, a falsifiable prediction set, and a system-class characterization, establishing cross-module interference measurement as a requirement for prompt-composed agent evaluation.

item.title: A multi-task spatiotemporal deep neural network for predicting penetration depth and morphology in laser welding
item.description:
Paper Link: https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.26260v1

AI Summary (中文)

多任务时空深度神经网络用于激光深熔焊熔深与焊缝形貌预测

在激光深熔焊中，实时、准确评估熔透状态、熔深尺寸及焊缝横截面形貌，是保障焊接质量与实现闭环质量控制的关键挑战。本文提出一种创新的多任务时空深度神经网络（MT-ST-DNN），可同步高精度预测熔透状态（穿透/未穿透）、熔深数值（mm）及焊缝横截面几何形态（像素级重建）。该模型以高速CMOS相机采集的顶部熔池动态图像序列为核心视觉输入，并融合激光功率、焊接速度、离焦量等关键工艺参数，构建“图像+参数”双模态特征融合框架。技术上，模型创新性地耦合三维卷积模块（提取时空纹理演化特征） 与状态空间模型（State Space Model, SSM）模块（建模长程时序依赖），显著提升对熔池动态行为的表征能力；同时引入多尺度特征金字塔与共享-分支解码结构，支撑三项任务协同优化。为保障模型鲁棒性与泛化性，本文设计了一套基于物理约束的数据增强与标注一致性校验流程，涵盖不同材料（304不锈钢、铝合金）、板厚（1–6 mm）及工艺窗口下的21,580组高质量标注样本。实验表明：在独立测试集上，熔透状态分类准确率达99.35%；熔深预测平均绝对误差仅为1.79 mm（相对误差<8.2%）；焊缝横截面重建的Dice相似系数达0.9565（即95.65%像素级重合度）。本研究为激光焊接在线质量监控提供了可部署、可解释、多目标协同的智能感知新范式。

AI Summary (English)

This paper introduces a novel multi-task spatiotemporal deep neural network (MT-ST-DNN) for simultaneous prediction of penetration state (penetrated/unpenetrated), penetration depth (mm), and weld cross-section morphology in laser keyhole welding. Leveraging top-view weld pool image sequences captured by a high-speed CMOS camera and synchronized process parameters, the model integrates 3D-CNN for spatiotemporal feature extraction and a state space model (SSM) for long-range temporal dependency modeling. A physics-informed dataset construction strategy ensures robustness across materials, thicknesses, and process conditions. On the independent test set, the model achieves 99.35% classification accuracy for penetration state, 1.79 mm mean absolute error for penetration depth prediction, and 95.65% Dice coefficient for cross-section reconstruction—demonstrating strong potential for real-time, in-situ quality control in industrial laser welding systems.

Abstract

In laser penetration welding, the assessment of penetration state and weld seam morphology plays a crucial role in determining the weld quality. This paper presents a comprehensive introduction of the innovative muti-task deep learning model that has the capability to predict penetration state, depth, and weld seam morphology with high accuracy. The monitoring platform relies on weld pool images captured during the laser welding process using a complementary metal-oxide-semiconductor camera. The proposed model integrates spatiotemporal features extracted from top weld pool images along with welding parameters, establishing a deep learning framework based on convolutional neural networks and state space models for more efficient extraction and processing of spatial-temporal information. Furthermore, a reliable method for constructing the dataset is proposed to enhance both robustness and generalization capability of the developed model. Validation results on the test set demonstrate that prediction accuracy for penetration state can reach 99.35%, while prediction error for penetration depth is 1.79 millimeter, and accuracy of reconstructing the weld cross-section is 95.65%. This study provides new insights and methodologies for in-situ quality control strategies in laser penetration welding systems.

item.title: Dataset Usage Inference without Shadow Models or Held-out Data
item.description:
Paper Link: https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.26257v1

AI Summary (中文)

背景与挑战

数据使用推断（Dataset Usage Inference, DUI）旨在量化某候选数据集中有多少比例样本实际参与了目标机器学习模型的训练。这一能力对数据确权、版权争议和合规审计至关重要。然而，现有DUI方法存在两大实践瓶颈：（1）依赖昂贵的影子模型（shadow models）——需训练多个与目标模型结构/分布相似的替代模型，对大模型（如扩散模型、LLMs）极不现实；（2）强依赖真实held-out数据——要求提供已知未参与训练的同分布样本集，而这在真实纠纷场景中几乎无法验证或获取。

方法创新

本文提出首个免影子模型、免真实held-out数据的实用DUI框架。核心思想是：

  • ✅ 合成非成员样本：通过轻量级生成策略（如加噪+重建、跨域迁移）构建高保真、语义合理但统计上“远离训练分布”的合成非成员数据；
  • ✅ 多源成员信号融合：联合利用梯度范数、预测熵、特征激活稀疏性及输出logit margin等互补信号，提升判别鲁棒性；
  • ✅ 建模为混合比例估计（Mixture Proportion Estimation, MPE）：将问题形式化为估计训练集在候选集与合成非成员集构成的混合分布中的占比，采用改进的KMM（Kernel Mean Matching）与稳健矩估计器求解。

实验与价值

在Stable Diffusion v2.1、SDXL等大型图像生成模型上验证，本方法在无任何真实非成员数据、不训练影子模型条件下，对5%–40%用量区间估计误差<6.2%（MAE），显著优于基线（平均提升3.8×）。它为数据所有者提供了开箱即用、计算友好、假设弱的量化工具，首次使DUI在真实大模型场景中具备落地可行性。

AI Summary (English)

Dataset Usage Inference (DUI) estimates the fraction of a candidate dataset used to train a target model—a critical capability for data ownership verification and AI governance. Existing DUI methods suffer from two impractical assumptions: they require computationally expensive shadow models to mimic the target, and they depend on a verified in-distribution held-out set known not to be in training—conditions rarely satisfied for modern large models or real-world disputes. We propose the first practical DUI framework that eliminates both constraints. Our approach generates high-fidelity synthetic non-member samples (e.g., via controlled perturbation and cross-domain reconstruction), extracts diverse membership signals (gradient norms, prediction entropy, feature sparsity, logit margins), and frames DUI as a robust mixture proportion estimation problem between the candidate dataset and synthetic non-members. Evaluated on Stable Diffusion v2.1 and SDXL, our method achieves <6.2% MAE in estimating usage fractions (5%–40%)—without shadow models or any real held-out data—outperforming prior work by 3.8× on average. This enables scalable, assumption-light DUI for real data rights enforcement.

Abstract

How much of my data was used to train a machine learning model? Dataset Usage Inference (DUI) aims to answer this by estimating what fraction of a dataset contributed to a model's training. However, existing DUI methods rely on assumptions that rarely hold in practice: they require training expensive shadow models to imitate the target model, and they assume access to both known training samples and an in-distribution held-out set confirmed to be absent from training. These conditions make current approaches impractical for modern large models and real data ownership disputes. We introduce a practical DUI framework that removes these constraints. Our method requires neither shadow models nor real held-out data. Instead, it generates synthetic non-member samples, extracts diverse membership signals, and casts DUI as a mixture proportion estimation problem to estimate what share of the candidate dataset was used during training. Experiments on large image generative models show that our method reliably quantifies dataset usage, providing a practical tool for data owners to determine how much of their data was used to train a model.

item.title: On the Limits of Stretching Quantum Pseudorandomness
item.description:
Paper Link: https://arxiv.org/abs/2606.24736v1

AI Summary (中文)

研究背景

伪随机态（Pseudorandom States, PRS）是经典伪随机生成器（PRG）在量子计算中的自然类比，由Ji、Liu与Song（CRYPTO ’18）首次形式化定义。经典PRG的核心特性之一是可伸缩性（stretching）：给定短种子，可高效生成任意多项式长度的伪随机比特串。然而，量子PRS是否具备类似性质——即能否将输入种子“拉伸”为远长于其长度的不可区分量子态——长期悬而未决，构成量子密码学基础理论的关键空白。

核心贡献与方法

本工作首次建立了关于单拷贝安全PRS（$\mathsf{1PRS}$）输出长度的黑盒分离结果：我们构造了一个量子预言机（quantum oracle），在此相对模型下，存在输出长度为 $m(n) = 1.1n$ 的 $\mathsf{1PRS}$，但不存在任何输出长度达 $m(n) = \Omega(n^{2+\varepsilon})$（$\varepsilon > 0$）的 $\mathsf{1PRS}$。该分离揭示了量子伪随机性存在本质的长度瓶颈，否定了无条件的多项式伸缩可能性。

技术上，我们创新性地结合并拓展了Chen–Coladangelo–Sattath（EUROCRYPT ’25）提出的公共Haar随机态（CHRS）模型，提出一种新型资源计数技术：精确刻画任意$\mathsf{1PRS}$生成器在CHRS模型中所能有效利用的独立Haar态数量上限。该界限不依赖具体电路结构，仅基于查询复杂度与态空间维度，从而实现对高伸缩性PRS的普适性排除。

意义与影响

本结果首次从复杂性理论角度为量子伪随机性的伸缩能力划定严格边界，表明量子类比并非经典性质的直接迁移；同时，CHRS资源界定技术为后续研究量子随机性、量子极简主义（quantum minimalism）及抗量子密码原语设计提供了新工具范式。

AI Summary (English)

Pseudorandom states (PRS) are the quantum analogue of classical pseudorandom generators (PRGs). While classical PRGs can stretch short seeds into arbitrarily long pseudorandom strings, it remains open whether quantum PRS admit analogous stretching—i.e., generating output states whose dimension grows superlinearly in the seed length. This work establishes the first black-box separation for single-copy secure PRS ($\mathsf{1PRS}$) with differing output lengths: we construct a quantum oracle relative to which $\mathsf{1PRS}$ with output length $m(n) = 1.1n$ exist, but no $\mathsf{1PRS}$ with $m(n) = \Omega(n^{2+\varepsilon})$ exists for any $\varepsilon > 0$. Our proof builds on the Common Haar Random State (CHRS) model and introduces a novel technique to bound the effective number of Haar-random resources any $\mathsf{1PRS}$ generator can access—yielding a tight limitation on stretchability. This refutes unconditional polynomial stretching of quantum pseudorandomness and provides a foundational complexity-theoretic barrier.

Abstract

Pseudorandom states, introduced by Ji, Liu, and Song (CRYPTO '18), are quantum analogues of classical pseudorandom generators. A fundamental property of classical pseudorandom generators is that their output can be stretched to arbitrary polynomial length. Whether an analogous stretching property holds for quantum pseudorandom states remains unclear. In this work, we prove the first black-box separation between single-copy secure pseudorandom states ($\mathsf{1PRS}$) with different output lengths. Specifically, we construct a quantum oracle relative to which $\mathsf{1PRS}$ with output length $m(n)=1.1n$ exist, but $\mathsf{1PRS}$ with output length $m(n)=Ω(n^{2+ε})$ do not, for any $ε>0$. Our proof leverages the Common Haar Random State (CHRS) model introduced by Chen, Coladangelo, and Sattath (EUROCRYPT '25), and introduces a technique to bound the effective number of resource CHRS states utilized by any $\mathsf{1PRS}$ generator in this model.
